languages.text:
Если враг в поле зрения и радиусе 8 наносит урон союзнику, накладывает на этого врага Staggered на 1 раунд.
2 раза в раунд.

traits.locale_text:
Если враг в поле зрения и радиусе 8 наносит урон союзнику, накладывает на этого врага Staggered на 1 раунд.
2 раза в раунд.

languages.text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.
languages.original_text:
Если враг в поле зрения и радиусе 8 наносит урон союзнику, накладывает на этого врага Staggered на 1 раунд.
2 раза в раунд.

traits.locale_text: Twice per round, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's line of sight deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes staggered for 1 round.

Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.
Twice per round, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's line of sight deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes staggered for 1 round.

Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

languages.text: Дважды за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник в радиусе 8 клеток в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} обладателя аугмента наносит урон союзнику, этот враг оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g} на 1 раунд.
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Дважды за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник в радиусе 8 клеток в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} обладателя аугмента наносит урон союзнику, этот враг оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g} на 1 раунд.

Дважды за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник в радиусе 8 клеток в {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} обладателя аугмента наносит урон союзнику, этот враг оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g} на 1 раунд.

languages.text: Deux fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, lorsqu'un ennemi se trouvant dans un rayon de 8 cases et dans la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} de l'utilisateur inflige des dégâts à un allié, cet ennemi subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} pendant 1 round.
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Deux fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, lorsqu'un ennemi se trouvant dans un rayon de 8 cases et dans la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} de l'utilisateur inflige des dégâts à un allié, cet ennemi subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} pendant 1 round.

languages.text: Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} iki kez, 8 hücrelik yarıçap içinde ve kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattında{/g} bulunan bir düşman bir dost birime hasar verirse o düşman {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} iki kez, 8 hücrelik yarıçap içinde ve kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattında{/g} bulunan bir düşman bir dost birime hasar verirse o düşman {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.

languages.text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}两次，位于使用者8格且{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内的敌人对盟友造成伤害后，该敌人将陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}，持续1轮。
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}两次，位于使用者8格且{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内的敌人对盟友造成伤害后，该敌人将陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}，持续1轮。

languages.text: Dos veces por {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cada vez que un enemigo situado en un radio de 8 casillas y dentro de la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} del usuario inflija daño a un aliado, ese enemigo queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} durante 1 asalto.
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Dos veces por {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cada vez que un enemigo situado en un radio de 8 casillas y dentro de la {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} del usuario inflija daño a un aliado, ese enemigo queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} durante 1 asalto.

languages.text: Wenn ein Gegner in einem Radius von 8 Feldern und in der {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} des Nutzers einem Verbündeten Schaden zufügt, wird dieser Gegner zweimal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} 1 Runde lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumeln{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Wenn ein Gegner in einem Radius von 8 Feldern und in der {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} des Nutzers einem Verbündeten Schaden zufügt, wird dieser Gegner zweimal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} 1 Runde lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumeln{/g} belegt.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}につき2回、半径8マス以内かつ使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g}内にいる敵が味方にダメージを与えるたびに、その敵は1ラウンドの間{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}状態になる。
languages.original_text: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}につき2回、半径8マス以内かつ使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g}内にいる敵が味方にダメージを与えるたびに、その敵は1ラウンドの間{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}状態になる。
